title: thunderbird security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[140.5.0-2.0.1]
- Fix prefs for new nss [Orabug: 37079820]
- Add Oracle prefs file

[140.5.0]
- Add OpenELA debranding

[140.5.0-2]
- Update to 140.5.0 ESR
